description: Defines data models, state classes, and error/result types related to authentication within the Android app, including session management, lock reasons, and authentication results.

classes.name: AuthState
classes.description: Sealed class representing different states of user authentication, including logged out, locked, and unlocked states.

classes.name: Locked
classes.description: Represents a locked session state with information about the session tokens and lock reason.

classes.name: Unlocked
classes.description: Represents an active or usable session with stored session tokens.

classes.name: SessionTokens
classes.description: Data class encapsulating access and refresh tokens along with expiration information.

classes.name: AuthResult
classes.description: Container for the result of authentication operations, including tokens and optional server message.

classes.name: AuthOpResult
classes.description: Sealed class representing success or failure result of auth operations.

classes.name: AuthError
classes.description: Sealed class defining various error types encountered during authentication processes.

methods.name: isAccessTokenExpired
methods.description: Checks if the access token has expired based on the current epoch time.
